description: You are a software developer working on an indie game prototyping a custom 2D rigid-body physics engine. The engine was recently refactored and now has 5 critical math and physics bugs causing objects to fly through walls, spin wildly, and violate conservation of energy/momentum. Identify and fix all 5 bugs in the 'engine/' directory of the physics engine code at /home/ga/workspace/physics_engine/ so that the test suite passes.
